title: penstemon bicolor subsp. typicus
intro: Penstemon bicolor subsp. typicus, also known as Rocky Mountain penstemon, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Penstemon genus, characterized by its distinctive two-colored flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Penstemon bicolor subsp. typicus include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
